summary: A recorded One America News remote interview, posted by the USCIS Director. He appears by video against a night Washington skyline showing the US Capitol and the Washington Monument, wearing glasses, a dark suit and tie. A lower-third chyron identifies him as 'JOSEPH EDLOW / DIRECTOR OF U.S. CITIZENSHIP AND IMMIGRATION SERVICES' beside an OAN bug and a 'Real America with Dan Ball' graphic. The narration concerns long-standing immigration fraud and USCIS hiring its first special agents to pursue it. The audio is broadcast interview speech.

script.scene: The USCIS Director speaks by video against a night Washington skyline with the Capitol and Washington Monument; chyron 'JOSEPH EDLOW / DIRECTOR OF U.S. CITIZENSHIP AND IMMIGRATION SERVICES'; OAN bug and 'Real America with Dan Ball' graphic.
Same framing as he continues his remarks to camera.

notable_text: JOSEPH EDLOW; DIRECTOR OF U.S. CITIZENSHIP AND IMMIGRATION SERVICES; OAN; Real America with Dan Ball
